content.en:
At this time, Ye Tian was inscribed the thirty-sixth black text.

Once the inscription was complete, he could continue to condense the layers of the Pagoda of Will.

Airplanes!

The inscription in black is complete.

At this time, the thirty-sixth-layer Will Pagoda released a black light, and the aura began to transform, as if the entire Will Pagoda was about to transform.

Rumble!!!!

An incomparably pure energy fused from the void inside the Pagoda of Will into the entire Extreme Dao Will.

"Will feed!"

Ye Tianming enlightened.

Obviously, after the thirty-six layers of the Will's Pagoda were all engraved with the Extreme Pole, a metamorphosis occurred, causing a wave of energy to evolve from within the Will's Pagoda, so that his overall Extreme Dao will began to improve, and the improvement was not low.

This is equivalent to gaining a part of the Extreme Dao Will for nothing, and the Extreme Dao Will is more condensed and powerful, which is also a benefit.

Soon, the will feedback is over, the overall quantity is not much, but the quality has improved, this is the key!

"Okay, you can continue to condense the Will Pagoda!"

Ye Tian began to condense the Will Pagoda step by step.

Thirty-seven floors!

Thirty-eight floors!

Thirty-nine floors!

......

When Ye Tian condensed to the seventy-second layer, he could no longer continue to condense the Will Pagoda.

"The seventy-two floors are also a bottleneck, and the seventy-two layers of the Will Pagoda must be condensed to the extreme path. "

Ye Tian muttered.

And he has only now comprehended the thirty-six extreme extreme paths, and it will take a long time to comprehend the remaining thirty-six extreme extreme paths one by one.

"It is a waste of time to comprehend the Extreme Extreme, and it is too wasteful to copy a treasure that contains the power of the Extreme Extreme Path and slowly comprehend it. Last time, I obtained a lot of treasures containing the Extreme Extreme Dao from the Void God Domain, so let's use them directly, and then use the treasures of the Voidless Heavenly Gate to help you comprehend the Extreme Extreme Dao, which can save a lot of time!" Ye Tian said darkly.

Thereupon.

Ye Tian began to frantically refine those treasures that contained the Extreme Dao, and his Extreme Dao Ancestors had a lot of endowments, so the absorption effect was even better.

According to his current comprehension at any cost, every ten Origin Domain Eras, he will probably be able to comprehend an extreme extreme path.

This kind of speed is unimaginable to many people!

Those triple ancestors, even if they have one or two extreme path ancestral endowments, it is easy to comprehend the extreme extreme path corresponding to the extreme path of the extreme path, but it is difficult to comprehend the extreme path of the extreme path, and the more extreme extreme paths of the enlightenment, it is as difficult as ascending to the sky!

The few Triple Origin Ancestors who had comprehended the seventy-two Extreme Extreme Paths that Ye Tian had seen in the Void God Domain before, they didn't know how many Origin Domain Epochs they had cultivated, and they had paid an unknown price to have such an achievement.

Therefore, Ye Tian's comprehension speed was enough to make the Five Primordial Ancestors envious and jealous.

Time flies.

Ye Tian comprehended one extreme path after another, and there were more and more black words on the Will Pagoda.

Of course, Ye Tian's resource consumption was very serious, and the resources that he had seized from the Void God Domain were consumed too quickly.

Finally, on this day, Ye Tian's resources were almost consumed.

"Cultivating to the peak of the Triple Primordial Ancestor, comprehending the sixty-nine kinds of Extreme Extreme Dao, and inscribed sixty-nine black characters on the Pagoda of Will!"

Ye Tian's strength now is much stronger than in the past!

For example, the Triple Ancestor Blood Shadow Ancestor who shot arrows, Ye Tian's current strength is not necessarily weaker than the other party, and it may even be more powerful.

"It's a pity that the resources are exhausted, otherwise I will soon be able to comprehend the seventy-two extreme extreme paths!" Ye Tian muttered.

Of course, with his comprehension and talent, he would only need to spend a few hundred Origin Realms at most to comprehend the remaining three Extreme Extreme Paths, and make up seventy-two Extreme Extreme Paths.

After comprehending so many extreme poles, Ye Tian was ready to create more and more powerful primordial control poles, so that he could truly exert his strength, and only then could he be comparable to those top Triple Primordial Ancestors who were truly demonic.

"Let's first create a primordial mastery technique involving thirty-six extreme extremes!"

Ye Tian planned.

This kind of primordial mastery technique, if it is really created, will definitely far surpass the ordinary primordial mastery technique.

Of course, it will take a long time.

But he had to create, otherwise he wouldn't be able to truly rank among the top Triple Ancestors.

......

this day.

The entire end of the realm, the extreme deep sea, trembled suddenly.

At this time, all the pseudo-original ancestors and original ancestors became nervous.

"What's going on?"

Ye Tian frowned slightly.

Soon, one by one, the perfect controllers of the Extreme Realm began to communicate and inquire about the situation, after all, the entire end of the realm suddenly trembled, as if it had been hit by something.

At this time, the Lord of the Boundless sent a message to Ye Tian.

"Endless Lord, something is wrong!"

The Unbounded Lord said.

Airplanes!

Ye Tian soon met with the Lord of the Unbounded.

At this time, the Unbounded Lord took Ye Tian and escaped into the Primordial Black Sea.

"What's wrong?"

Ye Tian asked.

"Infinite Lord, you perceive the end of the whole world!" said the Infinite Lord.

Ye Tian sensed it in the Primordial Black Sea, and suddenly found something different.

At the end of the realm, next to the Extreme Dao Deep Sea, there was an unknown original domain.

"No, it's not the original domain, it's the river basin!"

Ye Tian exclaimed.

"The Lord of Infinity seems to know a lot, and he even knows all about the river basin. The Unbounded Lord said solemnly: "Yes, this is indeed a special domain of the river basin, which is constantly flowing. The original domain was hit by a river basin, this possibility is too low, but I didn't expect to encounter it at the end of our world. The river basin is often the lair of the primordial black beast, and how powerful the primordial black beast is, the weakest primordial black beast has the combat power of a single ancestor, the stronger primordial black beast has the combat power of a double ancestor, and the primordial black beast of the triple ancestor also has a lot. At present, the end of the world does not officially border this river basin. I have a suggestion, and that is to just give up the end of the world and run away. We can take some of the top practitioners and discard all the rest. "

"Throw it all away?"

Ye Tian was stunned, the Lord of the Boundless was too ruthless.

"If we don't give up, if we don't escape, the end of the realm will be gone, if we take a group of cultivators with us, if we find a weak original domain in the future, we can also invade each other and develop our cultivation civilization again!" said the Lord of the Boundary.

"No, I don't agree!"

Ye Tian rejected this suggestion.
